company_info.description: Reskill Corp. engages in the corporate employee training business in Japan. It provides level-specific training services, including new employee, young employee, mid-career employee, and management training services; and thematic training services, such as compliance and harassment, customer service, leadership, communication, presentation, motivation, mental health, risk management, subordinate development and junior guidance, diversity, writing, communication, thinking, planning, business improvement, computer and OA skills, accounting, finance and legal, self-reliance, personnel evaluation, and career training services. The company also offers job-specific training services comprising sales, marketing, personnel, and call center training services; and industry-specific training services, including IT and communications, service, corporate services, distribution, and construction and real estate industries, as well as training for the manufacturing, logistics and transportation, organization and public interest corporation, advertising, and publishing industries. In addition, it provides IT training services, such as digital transformation, IT basics and qualification, web design, programming, system design, infrastructure, security, database, AI, advanced technology, development tool, project management, design, and quality control training services; and company training services, public lectures, and video courses. The company was founded in 1986 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
